title: Senior Software Engineer - Google India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Google India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Google India in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Google India:
Google India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Google India!
